message:
feat: make Learn process run concurrently with agent execution

LearnProcess now has a background loop (startBackground/stopBackground)
that processes signals as they arrive via an event-driven wake mechanism,
rather than draining the queue post-hoc after the agent completes.
session.ts starts the loop before agent.run() and stops it after.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
